escalation.rationale: Multiple active fronts with Ukrainian strikes on St. Petersburg, US-Iran exchanges in Gulf, and ceasefire violations in Lebanon.

ticker_items: Ukraine launches second drone wave targeting St. Petersburg oil facilities
Iran fires ballistic missiles at US bases in Kuwait, Bahrain
Israeli airstrikes kill Lebanese troops despite active ceasefire
Putin rejects Zelensky's peace talk offer amid escalating attacks

eastern_europe.description: Russia intercepted hundreds of Ukrainian drones near St. Petersburg during major economic forum.
Ukrainian sea attack drone self-detonated in Romanian Black Sea port, prompting beach evacuations.
Ukraine launched over 400 drones striking naval weapons depot and targets across Russian territory.
Russian drone strike damaged site near Chornobyl nuclear plant without radiation spike.
Ukrainian drones targeted oil depot and military infrastructure in second wave of attacks.

middle_east.description: Iran fired seven ballistic missiles toward Kuwait and Bahrain, targeting enemy bases.
Iran fired ballistic missiles and drones toward Bahrain, missiles intercepted.
US forces struck Iranian coastal radar sites after shooting down Iranian drones.
Iranian drone struck Kuwait airport terminal, killing one person and injuring dozens.
US forces struck Iranian coastal radar sites after shooting down Iranian drones near Strait of Hormuz.
Israeli airstrike targeted Lebanese army vehicle killing colonel and troops despite ceasefire.
Iran fired ballistic missiles at US military installations in retaliation for earlier strikes.
Iranian Revolutionary Guard launched missiles and drones targeting US facilities.
US forces struck Iranian radar installations after shooting down Iranian drones.

today.incident: Iranian drone strike on Kuwait airport

russia.text: I see no point in meeting his Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelensky until a peace deal is ready.
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

ukraine.text: Extremely vile attack that did not lead to spike in radiation.
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

middle_east.text: These incidents are a direct consequence of Russia's war of aggression against Ukraine
middle_east.speaker: António Costa
middle_east.title: European Council President

middle_east.text: Iranian claims of damaging US 5th Fleet headquarters in Bahrain are false.
middle_east.speaker: CENTCOM
middle_east.title: US Central Command

middle_east.text: situation with Iran seems to be going quite well
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Xi Jinping announced first visit to North Korea since 2019, scheduled for June 8-9. The trip comes as Pyongyang strengthens relations with Russia and unveils new nuclear fuel production facilities. China seeks to shore up ties with its nuclear-armed neighbor amid regional tensions.

House advanced $8 billion Ukraine aid package amid congressional pushback. US forces struck Iranian radar sites after intercepting Iranian drones and missiles targeting Gulf allies. Trump confirmed calling Netanyahu profanity over Lebanon operations.

Pakistan's Interior Minister scheduled to travel to Iran as part of ongoing diplomatic efforts to mediate between Tehran and Washington. Lebanese army chief departed for Pakistan for meetings linked to US-Iran negotiations.

financial.notes: Oil prices face potential doubling if Iran closes Bab el-Mandeb Strait as threatened.

update_log.text: Ukraine launches second wave of drone attacks on St. Petersburg oil facilities
Iran fires ballistic missiles at US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain in retaliation
Israeli airstrike kills Lebanese army colonel and troops despite ceasefire
US strikes Iranian coastal radar sites after intercepting drones
Russian drone strike damages site near Chornobyl nuclear plant without radiation increase.
Ukraine launches major drone offensive with 400+ aircraft targeting Russian naval base and refinery.
US forces strike Iranian coastal radar sites after shooting down Iranian drones near Strait of Hormuz.
Israeli airstrike kills Lebanese army colonel and troops despite ceasefire agreement.
Iran fires ballistic missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain, US responds with strikes on Iranian radar sites
Putin rejects Zelensky's direct peace talks proposal within 24 hours
Ukrainian sea drone explodes at Romanian NATO port, prompting beach evacuations
Russia intercepts hundreds of Ukrainian drones near St. Petersburg economic forum
